channel.title: Sathoshi on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Sathoshi on Tech Tracker

item.title: Future of CryptoCurrency's
item.description: <img src="https://1.bp.blogspot.com/-BUu1gUZuR_4/Xgn39vX25yI/AAAAAAAAAUI/6Q2VQi9seH8O0vDln11B_wsgYF5SLJblwCLcBGAsYHQ/s320/IMG_20191230_184139_309.jpg" alt=""> When Security was Foremost Priority For Everyone Than the techniques will be improved timely, from the ages of kings to the current government’s money and power plays a major from a poor person to the richest person in the world. We know some facts that kings used to store the treasuries in the unknown islands to the underground secret rooms , to keep the money safe from invaders.
